reasoning_model_1: The model attempts to generate the speech but suffers from a critical failure in content accuracy. The script provided was: 'You absolutely cannot be careless in this exam again, the grade for this course is very important to you, directly affecting whether you can graduate smoothly, so you must take it seriously.' However, the audio abruptly cuts off after the word 'again' (~00:05), omitting the majority of the text ('the grade for this course... take it seriously'). Regarding the feature 'Stress', the model does place some emphasis on 'absolutely' (~00:01-00:02) by elongating the vowels, but the severe incompleteness of the generation makes it impossible to evaluate the flow and context effectively. According to the scoring criteria, major omissions where voice content is clearly inconsistent result in a score of 0.
reasoning_model_2: The model successfully generates the complete text without any omissions or pronunciation errors. The fluency is high, with natural prosody and pacing. Regarding the specific instruction to emphasize the word 'absolutely', the model executes this perfectly. At timestamp ~00:00-00:02, the speaker clearly enunciates 'ab-so-lute-ly' with increased duration, distinct articulation of each syllable, and a pitch contour that makes it stand out significantly from the rest of the sentence. The emphasis is natural yet strong, effectively conveying the urgency implied by the text. The remainder of the sentence follows with appropriate serious tone, maintaining the paralinguistic request.
model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 failed to complete the generation task, stopping after the first clause and omitting more than half of the required text. This constitutes a critical failure in content accuracy. Model 2, on the other hand, delivered the full script with high fluency and successfully applied the requested paralinguistic feature (stress) on the word 'absolutely'. The stress in Model 2 was distinct and well-executed, whereas Model 1's partial attempt renders it disqualified compared to a fully correct output.
